nasb.text: These are to you the unclean among all the swarming things; whoever touches them when they are dead becomes unclean until evening.

esv.text: These are unclean to you among all that swarm. Whoever touches them when they are dead shall be unclean until the evening.

cnv.text: 在所有爬行的生物中，你們應以這些為不潔淨；牠們死了以後，觸摸牠們的，都不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 这些爬虫都是不洁净的。任何人碰到它们的尸体，都不洁净，要等到傍晚才能洁净。
